Tests the conversion of `undefined` to a Boolean value in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Boolean` function in JavaScript. It verifies that when `undefined` is passed to the `Boolean` function, the result is `false`. This test is narrow in scope, focusing specifically on the conversion of `undefined` to a boolean value. The use of `assert` indicates that this code is likely part of a test suite to ensure expected behavior in type conversion.
